summary: The SwingRatings algorithm indicates that SLB is currently testing its Daily 50MA support zone near $53.63. Based on historical price action, bounces from this level have yielded a win rate of 70.6%. This is a fresh test of the support, suggesting that optimal buy-side liquidity remains intact. In the event of a successful bounce, traders should monitor overhead supply, particularly a primary horizontal resistance at $56.79 and a significant trendline confluence around $55.27 (formed by 6 points). This setup presents a structured risk-reward profile for swing positioning.
